page_content:
GVPT319 Topics in Social Advocacy (1-3 Credits)

Reading, research and discussion of variety of topics related to social advocacy.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

GVPT320 Advanced Empirical Research (3 Credits)

Allows students to build on the knowledge of statistical inference they gained from GVPT201. Topics include data collection, data cleaning, data analysis, and data visualization. By the time students complete this class, they will be able to do basic statistical modeling using OLS regression independenily.
